name: Green Beans Marinade
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat a large pot of salted water to boiling.
2. Add beans, a handful at a time, to maintain a boil.
3. Boil uncovered until crisp tender, 3-6 minutes.
4. Drain the beans and cool under cold running water.
5. Repeat draining once more.
6. Place the cooled beans in a large mixing bowl.
7. Stir in olive oil, dill, and pepper to taste.
8. Toss to coat; add more oil if needed.
9. Refrigerate for at least 30 minutes.
10. Just before serving, stir in lemon juice to taste.
11. Transfer the marinated beans to a serving bowl.
12. Cut the red bell pepper into thin slivers and scatter over the beans.
13. Serve at room temperature.
